# io.singer { #tspaint.io.singer }

```python
tspaint.io.singer(
    source,
    *,
    ts=None,
    mcmc_step=None,
    mcmc_burnin=None,
    _Ne=None,
    _m=None,
    _r=None,
    _ratio=None,
    _n_samples=None,
    _thin=None,
    _polar=0.5,
    _ploidy=1,
    _seed=42,
    _penalty=None,
    _hmm_epsilon=None,
    _psmc_bins=None,
    _fast=False,
    _recomb_map=None,
    _mut_map=None,
    singer_args=None,
    workdir=None,
    singer_bin=None,
    with_mutations=True,
    max_retries=50,
    sequence_length=None,
)
```

Sample posterior ARGs from genotypes via SINGER (CLAUDE.md §7.4).

SINGER's MCMC samples ARGs from ``P(ARG | genotypes)``; the thinned post-burn-in
samples are the ideal input to :func:`tspaint.ensemble.merge_posterior_tables`,
since they represent genuine ARG uncertainty (§7.4).

**Posterior sampling is controlled by three unified knobs, shared with**
:func:`tspaint.io.argweaver` — ``ts`` (how many tree sequences you get back), ``mcmc_step`` (MCMC
iterations between saved samples) and ``mcmc_burnin`` (burn-in iterations). The chain runs
``ts * mcmc_step + mcmc_burnin`` iterations; tspaint translates the knobs into SINGER's native
``-n`` / ``-thin`` (see Returns). Every **native terminal flag** is exposed underscore-prefixed to
mark its 1:1 correspondence to the SINGER CLI: ``_Ne`` (``-Ne``, **required**), ``_m`` (``-m``),
``_r`` (``-r``) or ``_ratio`` (``-ratio``, default 1 — so ``r = m*ratio``), ``_polar``, ``_ploidy``,
``_seed``, ``_recomb_map`` / ``_mut_map``, ``_penalty`` / ``_hmm_epsilon`` / ``_psmc_bins``,
``_fast``, and the raw sampling flags ``_n_samples`` (``-n``) / ``_thin`` (``-thin``) — normally
left to inference from the three unified knobs. Passing a plain knob **and** its ``_``-counterpart
(e.g. ``ts`` and ``_n_samples``) raises: the plain one takes precedence.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**source**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tskit](`tskit`).[TreeSequence](`tskit.TreeSequence`) or [str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The genotypes to sample ARGs from — a tree sequence carrying mutations, a **VCF Zarr** store, or a **VCF** file (normalised by :mod:`tspaint.io_genotypes`). All are written out as a haploid VCF for SINGER.

<code>[**ts**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Number of posterior tree sequences returned (default 20). Exactly this many come back (see Returns) — a single :class:`tskit.TreeSequence` when 1, else a list.

<code>[**mcmc_step**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   MCMC iterations between saved samples (SINGER ``-thin``; default 50). Larger ⇒ more decorrelated returned samples.

<code>[**mcmc_burnin**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Burn-in MCMC iterations discarded before the kept samples (default 200); ``mcmc_burnin // mcmc_step`` leading saved samples are dropped.

<code>[**_Ne**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Diploid effective population size (``-Ne``). **Required** — SINGER needs it and tspaint does not estimate one silently. SINGER calibrates its prior so ``4·_Ne·_m ≈ π`` (observed diversity), so estimate _Ne over the **whole analysed panel** with :func:`tspaint.io.estimate_ne` (all-pairs ``π/4μ``). On a structured / multi-species sample that value is legitimately large — a too-small _Ne pushes deep coalescences off SINGER's representable range into noisy / failing runs. Omitting it raises ``ValueError``.

<code>[**_m**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Per-base mutation rate (``-m``). Required (or ``_mut_map``).

<code>[**_r**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Per-base recombination rate (``-r``). Defaults to ``_m * _ratio``.

<code>[**_ratio**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   The remaining SINGER terminal flags. All are forwarded 1:1 (``-polar`` 0.5, ``-ploidy`` 1, ``-seed`` 42, ``-fast`` off; the rest optional) **except** ``_ratio`` (default 1), which is not forwarded but sets ``_r = _m * _ratio`` when neither ``_r`` nor ``_recomb_map`` is set (mirrors SINGER's own ``-ratio``).

<code>[**_polar**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   The remaining SINGER terminal flags. All are forwarded 1:1 (``-polar`` 0.5, ``-ploidy`` 1, ``-seed`` 42, ``-fast`` off; the rest optional) **except** ``_ratio`` (default 1), which is not forwarded but sets ``_r = _m * _ratio`` when neither ``_r`` nor ``_recomb_map`` is set (mirrors SINGER's own ``-ratio``).

<code>[**_ploidy**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   The remaining SINGER terminal flags. All are forwarded 1:1 (``-polar`` 0.5, ``-ploidy`` 1, ``-seed`` 42, ``-fast`` off; the rest optional) **except** ``_ratio`` (default 1), which is not forwarded but sets ``_r = _m * _ratio`` when neither ``_r`` nor ``_recomb_map`` is set (mirrors SINGER's own ``-ratio``).

<code>[**_seed**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   The remaining SINGER terminal flags. All are forwarded 1:1 (``-polar`` 0.5, ``-ploidy`` 1, ``-seed`` 42, ``-fast`` off; the rest optional) **except** ``_ratio`` (default 1), which is not forwarded but sets ``_r = _m * _ratio`` when neither ``_r`` nor ``_recomb_map`` is set (mirrors SINGER's own ``-ratio``).

<code>[**_penalty**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   The remaining SINGER terminal flags. All are forwarded 1:1 (``-polar`` 0.5, ``-ploidy`` 1, ``-seed`` 42, ``-fast`` off; the rest optional) **except** ``_ratio`` (default 1), which is not forwarded but sets ``_r = _m * _ratio`` when neither ``_r`` nor ``_recomb_map`` is set (mirrors SINGER's own ``-ratio``).

<code>[**_hmm_epsilon**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   The remaining SINGER terminal flags. All are forwarded 1:1 (``-polar`` 0.5, ``-ploidy`` 1, ``-seed`` 42, ``-fast`` off; the rest optional) **except** ``_ratio`` (default 1), which is not forwarded but sets ``_r = _m * _ratio`` when neither ``_r`` nor ``_recomb_map`` is set (mirrors SINGER's own ``-ratio``).

<code>[**_psmc_bins**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   The remaining SINGER terminal flags. All are forwarded 1:1 (``-polar`` 0.5, ``-ploidy`` 1, ``-seed`` 42, ``-fast`` off; the rest optional) **except** ``_ratio`` (default 1), which is not forwarded but sets ``_r = _m * _ratio`` when neither ``_r`` nor ``_recomb_map`` is set (mirrors SINGER's own ``-ratio``).

<code>[**_fast**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   The remaining SINGER terminal flags. All are forwarded 1:1 (``-polar`` 0.5, ``-ploidy`` 1, ``-seed`` 42, ``-fast`` off; the rest optional) **except** ``_ratio`` (default 1), which is not forwarded but sets ``_r = _m * _ratio`` when neither ``_r`` nor ``_recomb_map`` is set (mirrors SINGER's own ``-ratio``).

<code>[**_recomb_map**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   The remaining SINGER terminal flags. All are forwarded 1:1 (``-polar`` 0.5, ``-ploidy`` 1, ``-seed`` 42, ``-fast`` off; the rest optional) **except** ``_ratio`` (default 1), which is not forwarded but sets ``_r = _m * _ratio`` when neither ``_r`` nor ``_recomb_map`` is set (mirrors SINGER's own ``-ratio``).

<code>[**_mut_map**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   The remaining SINGER terminal flags. All are forwarded 1:1 (``-polar`` 0.5, ``-ploidy`` 1, ``-seed`` 42, ``-fast`` off; the rest optional) **except** ``_ratio`` (default 1), which is not forwarded but sets ``_r = _m * _ratio`` when neither ``_r`` nor ``_recomb_map`` is set (mirrors SINGER's own ``-ratio``).

<code>[**_n_samples**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   SINGER's raw ``-n`` / ``-thin`` — normally inferred from ``ts`` / ``mcmc_step`` / ``mcmc_burnin``; set directly for full control (but not alongside the plain knob they correspond to).

<code>[**_thin**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   SINGER's raw ``-n`` / ``-thin`` — normally inferred from ``ts`` / ``mcmc_step`` / ``mcmc_burnin``; set directly for full control (but not alongside the plain knob they correspond to).

<code>[**singer_args**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[list](`list`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Extra raw SINGER command-line tokens appended after tspaint's own flags (so they take precedence). Default ``None``.

<code>[**workdir**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Working directory for VCF and ARG text tables (default: a fresh tempdir).

<code>[**singer_bin**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Path to the SINGER binary (default: ``DEFAULT_SINGER`` / ``TSPAINT_SINGER``).

<code>[**with_mutations**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[bool](`bool`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [True]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Whether to read mutations into the returned tree sequences (default True).

<code>[**max_retries**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [50]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Maximum ``-debug`` re-invocations with fresh seeds on failure (default 50).

<code>[**sequence_length**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Override the sequence length (SINGER ``-end``) for VCF / Zarr sources; defaults to the max variant position. Ignored for a ``ts`` source (its ``sequence_length`` is used).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [tskit.TreeSequence or list of tskit.TreeSequence]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Exactly ``ts`` posterior samples — a **single** :class:`tskit.TreeSequence` when ``ts == 1``, else a **list** of ``ts``. SINGER runs ``-n = ts + mcmc_burnin // mcmc_step`` samples ``-thin = mcmc_step`` iterations apart (``ts*mcmc_step + mcmc_burnin`` iterations total); tspaint discards the ``mcmc_burnin // mcmc_step`` burn-in samples and keeps ``ts``. E.g. ``ts=20, mcmc_step=2, mcmc_burnin=200`` → 20 samples over 240 iterations. Sample order is preserved (VCF column ``i`` -> sample ``i``); for a VCF / VCF-Zarr / ``Variants`` source the sample ids are stamped onto the sample nodes (:func:`tspaint.ids.attach_sample_ids`), so :func:`tspaint.paint` accepts ``labels`` keyed by sample-ID string as well as by node index.

## Raises {.doc-section .doc-section-raises}

<code>[:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[FileNotFoundError](`FileNotFoundError`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   If the SINGER binary is absent at ``singer_bin``.

<code>[:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[RuntimeError](`RuntimeError`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   If SINGER still exits nonzero after ``max_retries`` retries.

## Notes {.doc-section .doc-section-notes}

Mirrors SINGER's ``singer_master`` retry loop: on a nonzero exit it re-invokes
``-debug`` with fresh seeds.
